calendar.matters:
AMENDED ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Aug-08-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Joyce Long
Petitioner: Man Phoi Banh, present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for the Minor: Jake Banh, was sworn and examined.
Father of the Minor Perry Apay Zhu appeared and was examined by court and signed the petition
consenting to the name change for the Minor.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of a Minor to: JACOB ZACHERY CHU
Decree signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jul-25-2006 Off Calendar
